<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="7cd8nIs4_3OdFWksTy8G" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-579" dy="-160" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title_eng" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#3A6B8A;" value="工程样机层 Engineering Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eng_layer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F4F8FB;strokeColor=#B8CCDB;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=6 6;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="280" width="800" x="40" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fwmav" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EFF5;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1F2A36;" value="<b>FlappingWingVehicle</b><br>(扑翼飞行器整机)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="370" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="equipment" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F0;strokeColor=#999988;fontSize=12;" value="Equipment<br>(组件)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="80" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="drive" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F0;strokeColor=#999988;fontSize=12;" value="DriveMechanism<br>(驱动机构)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="80" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="performance" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F0;strokeColor=#999988;fontSize=12;" value="Performance<br>(性能记录)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="80" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="application" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F0;strokeColor=#999988;fontSize=12;" value="Application<br>(任务场景)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="690" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="organization" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F0;strokeColor=#999988;fontSize=12;" value="Organization<br>(研制单位)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="690" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reference" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F0;strokeColor=#999988;fontSize=12;" value="Reference<br>(文献溯源)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="690" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee1" edge="1" parent="1" source="equipment" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=1;opacity=60;" target="fwmav"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee2" edge="1" parent="1" source="drive" source="organization" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=1;opacity=60;" target="fwmav"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ee6" edge="1" parent="1" source="reference" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#3A6B8A;strokeWidth=1;opacity=60;" target="fwmav"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="title_bio" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#587A4A;" value="生物原型层 Biology Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="320" x="40" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bio_layer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F9F1;strokeColor=#B5CAA0;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=6 6;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="800" x="40" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hummingbird" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAF2E5;strokeColor=#587A4A;fontSize=12;" value="蜂鸟<br>Hummingbird" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="100" x="80" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fly" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAF2E5;strokeColor=#587A4A;fontSize=12;" value="苍蝇<br>Fly" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="100" x="220" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pigeon" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAF2E5;strokeColor=#587A4A;fontSize=12;" value="鸽子<br>Pigeon" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="100" x="360" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="seagull" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAF2E5;strokeColor=#587A4A;fontSize=12;" value="海鸥<br>Seagull" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="100" x="500" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bat" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAF2E5;strokeColor=#587A4A;fontSize=12;" value="蝙蝠<br>Bat" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="100" x="640" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bio_more" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#587A4A;" value="…" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="60" x="760" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" edge="1" parent="1" source="fwmav" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#C0392B;strokeWidth=2;curved=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#C0392B;rounded=0;exitX=0.15;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="hummingbird" value="<b>MIMICS-aero</b>
s=0.81"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="270" y="370" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" edge="1" parent="1" source="fwmav" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#28867D;strokeWidth=2;curved=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#28867D;rounded=0;exitX=0.4;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="fly" value="<b>MIMICS-scale</b>
s=0.85"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="350" y="390" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" edge="1" parent="1" source="fwmav" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#D89B30;strokeWidth=2;curved=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#D89B30;rounded=0;exitX=0.6;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="pigeon" value="<b>MIMICS-kin</b>
s=0.74"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="470" y="390" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" edge="1" parent="1" source="fwmav" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#7E57C2;strokeWidth=2;curved=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#7E57C2;rounded=0;exitX=0.85;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=#FFFFFF;" target="seagull" value="<b>MIMICS-mor</b>
s=0.69"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="570" y="370" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=4;spacingLeft=8;" value="MIMICS 4 类映射关系" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="200" x="870" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg_aero_dot" parent="1" style="ellipse;html=1;fillColor=#C0392B;strokeColor=#C0392B;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="12" width="12" x="884" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg_aero_txt" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="aero 气动相似 (Re, St)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="160" x="902" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg_kin_dot" parent="1" style="ellipse;html=1;fillColor=#D89B30;strokeColor=#D89B30;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="12" width="12" x="884" y="165" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg_kin_txt" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="kinematics 运动学 (扑频)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="160" x="902" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg_mor_dot" parent="1" style="ellipse;html=1;fillColor=#7E57C2;strokeColor=#7E57C2;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="12" width="12" x="884" y="195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg_mor_txt" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="morphology 形态 (展弦比)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="160" x="902" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg_sca_dot" parent="1" style="ellipse;html=1;fillColor=#28867D;strokeColor=#28867D;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="12" width="12" x="884" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg_sca_txt" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="scale 尺度 (翼展/质量)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="160" x="902" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lg_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=10;fontColor=#555555;fontStyle=2;" value="每条 MIMICS 边携带
4 维相似度分数 + dominant_type" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="180" x="884" y="255" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
